title: Mall Security Incident Report
text:
## Mall Security Incident Report

At {number} PM near the {place}, officer {person} observed a {adjective} disturbance.

A {animal} wearing a {color} {clothing item} was {verb ending in -ing} beside the fountain while shoppers threw {plural noun}.

Suspect attempted to {verb} using a stolen {vehicle} from the toy kiosk.

Recovered items: one {object}, half a {food}, and a {noun} marked property of the {job}.

Crowd mood: {emotion}. Security response: {adjective} and {adverb}.
